title: OMG: Omni-Modal Motion Generation for Generalist Humanoid Control
summary: OMG converts diverse human intent signals — language, audio, and human reference motion — into executable whole-body trajectories for humanoid robot control. The system employs a generator-tracker hierarchy where OMG-DiT predicts future motions from multi-modal conditions, which a motion tracker converts to physically executable robot trajectories. The accompanying OMG-Data dataset comprises 1,174.66 hours of robot-executable omni-modal motion data.
